name: spellbook
description: Edgar's personal collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: revelio
plugins.description: Multi-lens code review that reveals hidden issues before you open a GitHub PR — security, architecture, and quality lenses plus technology experts for Swift/Apple, Safari web extensions, .NET, Python, and Bash.

plugins.name: legilimens
plugins.description: Turns a rough idea into an agreed design through Socratic dialogue — one question at a time, real alternatives with trade-offs, and a design approved section by section — then writes the spec and hands off. Never writes code.
